chunks.text: ORDER SHEET IN THE HIGH COURT OF SINDH CIRCUIT COURT MIRPURKHAS Criminal Misc: Application No.S-33 of 2026 “Muhammad Aslam versus SSP, Mirpurkhas & others” DATE ORDER WITH SIGNATURE OF JUDGE 1. For order on office objection. 2. For hearing of main case. 26.02.2026 Mr. Farhan Ahmed Bozdar, advocate for the applicant. Mr. Ghulam Abbas Dalwani, D.P.G a/w SIP Azizullah PS Tando Adam. Mr. Zuhaib Hassan Mari advocate has filed power on behalf of respondent No.1. = In compliance with the last order, the police have produced the detenue, namely Mst. Fatima, daughter of Parkho, before this Court. She has stated that she was not confined in any unlawful detention and that she wishes to reside with her parents. She further submitted that she has already filed a suit for dissolution of marriage by way of Khula and intends to pursue the same while residing with her parents. She has expressed her desire to sever all ties with the applicant, who is her husband. In view of the above, the instant Criminal Miscellaneous Application is hereby dismissed, as the detenue is at liberty to reside wherever she desires. JUDGE Adnan Ashraf Nizamani
